name: The AI-First Mandate
effect: Declare the organization AI-first. All existing roadmaps are retroactively considered AI initiatives. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: REBRANDING CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When this card is played: All current projects gain the prefix 'AI-Powered' at no additional cost.

clauses.name: ACCOUNTABILITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If outcomes are questioned: Redirect to the boldness of the vision.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: No one can locate the AI strategy document.

witness_quote: Leadership is fully aligned on this.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which system, specifically, is the AI?
